name: eval spec schema: bootstrap_seed must be boolean when present
command: echo '{"name":"t","command":"echo hi","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0},"bootstrap_seed":"true"}' > spec.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-eval-spec.sh" spec.json 2>&1 | grep -q "bootstrap_seed" && echo ok >&2
